titleStmt.title: SII 24.39: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 39. (A.R. No. 11 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Seems to refer to a sale of land the details of which are, however, lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemi yaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅkuja toḻilāl putu maṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayil muṉaik kon=ta ḷavaraicar tan=taḷa miriya vāḷurai kaḻittut toḻvalikāṭṭip poṟpari naṭā
ttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temarukamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyā n tirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭiyiraṇṭu ntaṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munṉai maṟuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkolticai
toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunilaviḷākam Eṅkaṇum tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇi lāt tikaḻa Orutani meruviṟ katañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karuntalai paruntalait tiṭat tan ponnakarppuṟattiṭai kiṭappa vinnāḷ piṟkulap piṟai pol niṟpiḻaiye
nnuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvena Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷuñ cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun=talai virit talamarak kuṭaticait tannā
ṭukan=ta tānu n=taranaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap palapalamutukum payantetir māṟiya jayapperuntiru vum ṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oruvicaik kaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ
koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkaḷum porukaritalaṅkaḷun=tantira vāriyumuṭaittāy van=ta vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal pāyvatu polat tanperuñceṉaiyai yevip pañcavaraiyvarum poru tamaṟkaḷattañci veruneḷittoṭi Araṇenap pukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu (tuṭaittu) nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar ta
yastampan ticaitoṟu niṟutti muttin calāpamum mutta miṭ potiyamum matta veṅkari paṭu maiyyaccayyamum kanniyuṅ kaik koṇṭaruḷina nāṭṭi kaṭal malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāve ṟellān tani vicum peṟa māveṟiya tanvarutanit talaivarai
nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi poṅkoḷiyāramun tiruppuyattalaṅ kaḷum pola viramuntiyākamum viḷaṅka ttumai yena tinacintāmaṇi yavanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa Avaḷuṭan kaṅkai viṟṟiruntena maṅkaiyar tilatam Eḻicaivallapi Eḻulakamuṭaiyāḷ Ūḻiyamaintinitiruppa
m virasiṅhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesari panmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulo[ ttuṅkacoḷadevaṟku yāṇṭu] Āḻvār kanmikaḷil śrīvaiyiṣṇavakkaṇakku śrī vaiyiṣṇavappiriyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻvār kanmi
dāsarum śrīpaḷḷikoṇṭān puṇṭarikanum ncirākava ppiriyanum śrīvaiyiṣṇavakkaṇakku śrīvaiyiṣṇava Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻvār kanmi
kku kāveri kulai Uṭaintu tirutta Uṇṇātu kollaiyāka kiṭanta nilattukku Icain
ta melpāṟkellai jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa viḷākattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai meṟ paṭi viḷākattu vāykkālukku teṟkum Ivvicainta perunān kellaiyuḷḷiṭṭa nila Innilamukkālum koṇṭu
tirutti kku veli Eṇkala paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāl śrī paṇṭāratte Aḷakkak kaṭavānākavum Itil virutti koṇṭu kāttikai tiruvamutu Irupa
palaccaṟkarai Amutum Aññāḻimiḷakamutum munnāḻi Amutum Aṭaikkāy Amutum ḷamum kimānamutukku (?) veṇṭuṅ kaṇṭacaṟkarai Amutu koṇṭu tirukkarakka kaṇṇi
Amutu ceyvikka kaṭavārākavum nāṭi nāḷum pakal Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ yeḻuntaruḷi Amutu ceytu Amāvāsi Ik
namutum kaṇṭa caṟkarai Amutum ceyvānākavum tiruvācal ponta Eppeṟpaṭṭa
Eḻuttu Ittanmam Ivanum Ivan varkattārumey Ittarumam
kku Ivai śrīvaiyiṣṇavappiriyan neḻuttu kovilamutupuṇṭarīka Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan kecuvan taniiḷañciṅkatti neḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai cirāman Ārāvamutu Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan cirākavan nā The rest is damaged and lost.
Digital edition of SII 24.39 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
